changelog: v2.9.5 - Akilli responsive layout + 13 inc ekran fix
STRATEGY: 1280px ustu yan yana, 1100px alti dikey yigin
FIX: Yatay overflow korumasi (html, body overflow-x:hidden)
FIX: flex-wrap:wrap + min-width:0 - flexbox shrink calismasi icin
FIX: Input flex:2 1 280px - en az 280px genislik garantili
FIX: Captcha flex:1 1 240px - kompakt ama okunaklı
MOBIL: 560px alti - input font 14px, ikon 16px, captcha wrapping
